examples: So Drs Tanaka and Shimoyama decided to build an artificial swallowtail, dubbed an "ornithopter".
The Italian painter Leonardo Da Vinci made his famous sketches of the ornithopter around 1485.
Todd Reichert's ornithopter is an engineless plane that stays aloft by flapping its wings like a bird.
As part of a graduate project a year earlier, the two built the world's first human-powered ornithopter a plane that flaps its wings and flew it nearly 500 feet.
